name: The Great Neapolitan Bundt Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (325°F for pans with non-stick finish).
2. Generously grease and flour a 12-cup bundt cake pan.
3. Blend the cake mix (dry), water, oil, and eggs on low speed until moistened; beat 3 minutes on medium speed.
4. Pour 1/3 of the batter into the pan.
5. Measure 1/2 of the remaining batter into a small bowl; stir in strawberry extract and food color.
6. Carefully pour into the pan.
7. Stir chocolate-flavored syrup into the remaining batter; carefully pour into the pan.
8. Bake for 40 to 45 minutes or until the top springs back when touched lightly in the center.
9. Cool for 10 minutes, then remove from the pan and cool completely.
10. Spread cake with Chocolate Glaze, allowing some to drizzle down the sides.
Chocolate Glaze:
1. Mix confectioners' sugar and chocolate-flavored syrup until smooth. If necessary, a few drops of water or a small amount of confectioners' sugar can be added until the desired consistency is reached.
2. Note: You can substitute yellow cake mix for white cake mix. Increase water to 1 1/4 cups. From Betty Crocker
